mapper.select: SELECT regex_idx, regex_str, use_yn, remark, add_date, add_id FROM CMS_BOARD_REGEX_FILTER ORDER BY regex_idx DESC
SELECT regex_idx, regex_str, use_yn, remark, add_date, add_id FROM CMS_BOARD_REGEX_FILTER WHERE regex_idx = #{regex_idx}
mapper.update: UPDATE CMS_BOARD_REGEX_FILTER SET regex_str = #{regex_str}, use_yn = #{use_yn}, remark = #{remark}, add_date = SYSDATE, add_id = #{add_id} WHERE regex_idx = #{regex_idx}
